claim_text: The prototype includes a Sanborn-linked livery stable location as a placeholder map feature tied to the verified 1885 Sanborn source record.
reasoning_note: The source record is verified, but the example livery stable location remains a placeholder until sheet-level building extraction is completed.

claim_text: Students are asked to investigate a fictional missing ledger as the classroom mission frame.
reasoning_note: The missing ledger is invented for gameplay and must never be presented as historical fact.

claim_text: The Library of Congress records an October 1885 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map for Texarkana, Bowie County, Texas, with 5 sheets.
reasoning_note: Verified from LOC item sanborn08781_001 metadata: created/published by Sanborn Map Company in Oct. 1885 and described as 5 sheets.
